name: pi-fusion
description: Multi-model deliberation for pi, inspired by OpenRouter Fusion

scripts.build: echo 'pi-fusion is loaded directly by pi via jiti; no build step required'
scripts.test: node --import jiti/register src/__tests__/utils.test.ts src/__tests__/config.test.ts src/__tests__/models.test.ts src/__tests__/format.test.ts
